name: EmbedUpload
summary: Candidate mirror-uploader service pending first-party verification for upload-once fan-out across multiple downstream hosts.

max_file_size.notes: Detailed mirror-upload limits for this candidate have not yet been verified from first-party sources.

retention.notes: Retention likely depends on downstream mirrored hosts, but that still needs first-party verification.

storage.notes: Standalone storage behavior for this mirror-uploader candidate has not yet been verified.

bandwidth.notes: Bandwidth behavior has not yet been verified from first-party sources.

account.benefits: Account requirements and feature differences are still pending first-party review.

developer.notes: Developer and automation support have not yet been verified from first-party sources.

allowed_file_types.notes: Allowed file types probably depend on downstream hosts, but that still needs first-party verification.

security.notes: The user-provided seed link was HTTP-only, and current HTTPS behavior still needs verification.
